description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a striking black and white striped exterior, set within a rectangular plot bordered by a low concrete wall. The main structure features a flat roof with a large solar panel mounted on top, indicating an emphasis on sustainability. The front entrance is accentuated by a smaller, protruding section with a flat canopy supported by columns, and a set of double doors. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically placed along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light. The surrounding area is covered with neatly trimmed grass, and the overall design is minimalist with clean, geometric lines. The use of bold contrasting colors and the solar panel suggest a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, black and white striped bungalow with a flat roof, solar panel, and a prominent front entrance, set within a grassy, walled plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a canopy, double doors, and the striped facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large solar panel on the roof and the extended grassy yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, striped roof and symmetrically placed windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the intersection of the main and entrance sections, with the solar panel visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front and rear windows with grouped side windows
